name: Iso11783OPExecuteMacro
title: Iso11783OPExecuteMacro
syntax: long Iso11783OPExecuteMacro( dword ecuHandle, dword macroID );
description: The function executes a macro object. An Execute Macro command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
